mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, title, content, link_url, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{linkUrl}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, title, content, link_url, is_read, created_at FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
